title: zornia pratensis subsp. barbata
intro: Zornia pratensis subsp. barbata is a plant species in the genus Zornia, native to tropical regions, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a potential remedy for coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Zornia pratensis subsp. barbata can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
